zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston於從大約1475年到1483年出生在英國戴文波特萊其時，她的父親Philip Hingston63歲，母親Dorothy Gilard42歲。她於大約1490年與John Coffin在英國戴文比德福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1570年在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston于从大约1475年到1483年出生在英国戴文波特萊其时，她的父亲Philip Hingston63岁，母亲Dorothy Gilard42岁。她于大约1490年与John Coffin在英国戴文比德福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1570年在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Hingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hingson
meanings: English (Devon): probably a variant of   Hingston  . The name inthis spelling has died out in England.

variants.name: Hinkson
meanings: English: habitational name from Hingston in Bigbury or Hingston Down in Moretonhampstead (both Devon). Hinxton (Cambridgeshire) is a possible alternative source for the surname in eastern England. Hingston in Bigbury derives from Old English hind ‘hind, female deer’ + stān ‘stone’, while Hingston Down in Moretonhampstead comes from Old English hengest ‘horse, stallion’ + dūn ‘hill’. Hinxton (Cambridgeshire) derives either from Old English hengest or the Old English personal name Hengest + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Phillippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston was born from about 1475 to 1483, in Portledge, Devon, England, her father, Philip Hingston, was 63 and her mother, Dorothy Gilard, was 42. She married John Coffin about 1490, in Bideford, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1570, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston est née du environ 1475 au 1483, à Portledge, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Philip Hingston, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Gilard, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé John Coffin environ 1490, à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1570, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston von um 1475 bis 1483 in Portledge, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip Hingston 63 und ihre Mutter Dorothy Gilard 42. Sie hat um 1490 in Bideford, Devon, England John Coffin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1570 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston è nata il da circa 1475 a 1483 nel Portledge, Devon, England, sua padre, Philip Hingston, aveva 63 anni e sua madre, Dorothy Gilard, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato John Coffin circa 1490, nel Bideford, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1570, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Phillippa Hingstonがから約1475年まで1483年にイギリスデボンポルトレッジで生まれた時，父Philip Hingstonは63歳，母Dorothy Gilardは42歳であった。約1490年にイギリスデボンビデフォードでJohn Coffinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1570年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston(이)가 대략 1475년 부터 1483년 까지 영국 데폰 포틀레지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip Hingston(은)는 63세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Gilard(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 대략 1490년 영국 데폰 비데퍼드에서 John Coffin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1570년 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston nasceu de aproximadamente 1475 a 1483, em Portledge, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip Hingston, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Gilard, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com John Coffin aproximadamente 1490, em Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1570, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston родилась с около 1475 по 1483 в местности портледж, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip Hingston было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Gilard, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Coffin около 1490 г. в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1570 г. в её родном городе.
